name: Set Behavior Enabled
description: Enables or disables a behavior on the target object.
author: stemstudio
documentation:
## Set Behavior Enabled

Enables or disables a behavior on the target object.

### Runtime Notes
- Attach this lambda to objects via Lambda Components.
- If Auto Apply is enabled, it runs every frame.
- If Auto Apply is disabled, call `lambdaInstance.apply(deltaTime)` from behavior/lambda code.

### Component Parameters
| Key | Label | Type | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `behaviorRef` | Behavior ID/UUID | `string` | `` | - |
| `matchBy` | Match By | `enum` | `id` | `Behavior ID` (`id`), `Behavior UUID` (`uuid`) |
| `enabled` | Enabled | `boolean` | `true` | - |
| `includeChildren` | Include Children | `boolean` | `false` | - |
| `applyOnce` | Apply Once | `boolean` | `true` | - |
